_comment: WC 2026 live adjustments v2 - June 21, 2026. Positive att_mod = stronger attack. Positive def_mod = weaker defence (easier to score against). Negative def_mod = stronger defence.

Brazil._reason: Neymar absent, Raphinha uncertain, Estevao out. Attack looks noticeably worse than model expectations.

Spain._reason: Yamal fitness concerns expose heavy dependence on him for creativity.

Portugal._reason: Ranking around 5th-6th looks justified. No major correction.

Morocco._reason: Brazil draw confirms defensive quality despite injuries.

Japan._reason: Mitoma loss hurts, but performances suggest attack remains excellent.

Uruguay._reason: Attack still mediocre, but Saudi draw suggests defence slightly overrated.

Ivory Coast._reason: Results against Germany and Ecuador suggest they are slightly underrated.

Ecuador._reason: Still elite defensively but perhaps not best defence in tournament.

Germany._reason: Attack is elite. Defence leaks against decent opposition.

Netherlands._reason: Attack excellent. Defence considerably weaker than model due to De Ligt absence and tournament evidence.

Switzerland._reason: 4-1 win over Bosnia suggests attack slightly underrated.

United States._reason: Model probably underrates attacking talent generation.

Sweden._reason: Isak-Gyokeres combination is better than historical data suggests.

Norway._reason: Haaland effect is significantly underrepresented due to lack of tournament data.

Canada._reason: Davies absence remains huge despite Qatar blowout.

Bosnia and Herzegovina._reason: Injuries and 4-1 defeat to Switzerland justify further downgrade.

Australia._reason: Defensive metrics likely inflated by opposition quality.

Cape Verde._reason: Spain result appears to be an outlier. Defence significantly overrated.

New Zealand._reason: Iran draw suggests marginally better attack than model.
